title: Inheritance
description:
Inheritance allows a class to inherit fields and methods from another class.

Fix the Dog class to properly extend Animal and override the speak() method.
objectives: Override the speak method with @Override annotation
hints: Use 'class Dog extends Animal' to inherit.
Call super(name) in the child constructor to initialize parent fields.

checks.failMessage: Call super(name) to initialize the parent class.
Add @Override annotation before the speak method in Dog.
